requiredProof: production gate dry-run proof is accepted
current allowlist still refuses production writes
exclusionRules: do not include intentional crash rows
do not include display/render live-proof-first rows in this first candidate batch
do not include rows requiring real config access in this sprint
do not enable selected rows in this sprint
preferredFirstBatchTraits: reviewable through explicit high-risk approval before enablement
selectionCriteria.batchJustification: The batch is intentionally small and limited to debug logging/error presentation rows with simple values and complete non-live proof. It avoids display/render rows, cursor/input rows, runtime-dynamic rows, and intentional-crash rows for the first approval review.

approvalModel.approvalArtifactRequiredForFutureEnablem: A future sprint must add explicit approval evidence before moving any candidate from candidateForReview to approvedForFutureEnablementSprint or writable.

candidateRows.selectionReason: Selected for the first small approval-review batch because existing reports prove official source support, source-backed allowed values, proof-only validator acceptance/rejection, temp fixture write/reread/rollback proof, UI warning projection, persisted recovery scaffold proof, and ReportOnlyDryRun gate acceptance; the row is a debug logging/error presentation setting, is not runtime-dynamic, and is not intentional crash behavior.
candidateRows.uiWarningProof: advanced/high-risk UI warning projection added; production enablement UI wiring remains future work
candidateRows.requiredConfirmation: A future enablement path must require the persisted recovery confirmation token and must reject wrong or missing tokens before keep/apply.
candidateRows.requiredRollback: A future enablement path must create a backup before mutation and prove rollback restore plus parser reread against the target path.
candidateRows.requiredTimeoutBehavior: A future enablement path must choose rollback on timeout or no confirmation; keep/apply cannot occur after timeout without valid confirmation.
candidateRows.requiredFutureApproval: explicit high-risk approval required; current status is candidateForReview only
futureEnablementConditions: All frozen proof fields in this report must remain true.
The row must receive explicit high-risk approval in a future non-mutating approval artifact.
Production gate integration must continue to require persisted recovery plan validation, backup proof, rollback parser reread proof, confirmation token proof, and timeout rollback behavior.
ProductionWrite must remain refused until the future enablement sprint intentionally wires only the approved candidate row.
Live/runtime proof must be supplied or explicitly waived by future approval; dry-run acceptance alone is insufficient.
Aggregate reports and counts must be updated in the future enablement sprint only if the row is actually enabled.
candidateRows.exactRemainingBlocker: explicit high-risk approval for enablement missing; production write integration still disabled; live/runtime proof or explicit waiver missing; not an enablement sprint
